title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions:
Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions!
